name: Nexus
title: One of Many

abilities.name: Coddled
abilities.text: Enemy models may not cheat fate when targeting this model if it is within 2" of another ally.

abilities.name: Tummy Full of Screams
abilities.text: After this model suffers damage from an enemy attack, the enemy model gains a Parasite token.

actions.name: Embrace of the Spinneret
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is in base contact with a Web marker, this action receives +2 Skl. This model heals 2. If this attack receives a raise, this model heals an additional +1.

triggers.name: Leech Magic
triggers.text: Target must have a Parasite token. Once per turn. Draw two cards.

triggers.name: Subsume Will
triggers.text: Target must have a Parasite token. Deal 2 damage to the target.

triggers.name: Spin Web
triggers.text: Make a Web marker within 1" of the target.

actions.name: Take Over for Me
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. Replace the target with a Nexus, One of Many. Then, the new model heals 2 and gains a Summon token.

actions.name: Snug in the Swarm
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a Web marker. Summon an Eyes and Ears in base contact with the target. Then, remove the target.

extraction_notes: Master characteristic shows as 'Master (3)' which may indicate model limit of 3, but this is unusual for a Master
Totem field shows '.' which may be a placeholder or artifact
